Package gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.mock.perf

Class AbstractPerformanceSimulator

java.lang.Object
gov.cdc.izgateway.soap.mock.perf.AbstractPerformanceSimulator
All Implemented Interfaces:

Direct Known Subclasses:
PerformanceSimulatorDailyFailures
public abstract class AbstractPerformanceSimulator extends Object implements PerformanceSimulatorInterface

  • Field Details

    • DELAY_UNIT

      public static final int DELAY_UNIT
      The number of milliseconds used for each bucket in the DELAYS table.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • OVERHEAD

      public static final int OVERHEAD
      The quantity of delay to assume is already present due to existing network roundtrip overhead between IZGW and this mock. This should be determined by experiment, but is assumed to be 50ms for now. This should account for compute setting up the connection.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DELAYS

      public static final Histogram DELAYS
      Data below represents the IIS Timing Response Profile Out of 1000 requests, 162 complete in 250ms or less, 303 in 250-500ms, et cetera. Can be used to interpolate a random delay response.

    • QBP_SIZES

      public static final Histogram QBP_SIZES

      public static final Histogram VXU_REQUEST_SIZES
